title: Valid Parameters
description: Valid game parameters for the roar-sre application.

scoringVersion.description: Version of the scoring system to use.

skipInstructions.description: Indicates if instructions should be skipped.

storyOption.description: Indicates if story should be shown.

timerLength.description: Length of the timer in milliseconds.

userMode.description: Mode of the user during the task.

properties.consent: consent must be a boolean or null.
properties.lng: lng must be a string with a value of 'de', 'en', 'es', 'it', 'pt' or null.
properties.recruitment: recruitment must be a string with a value of 'demo', 'otherLabs', 'pilot' or null.
properties.scoringVersion: scoringVersion must be a number value of one of the following: 1 (sre-es), 3 or 4 (sre), or null.
properties.skipInstructions: skipInstructions must be a boolean or null.
properties.storyOption: storyOption must be a string with a value of 'grade-based', boolean, or null.
properties.timerLength: timerLength must be a number between 0 and 180000 or null.
properties.userMode: userMode must be a string with a value of 'default', 'demo', '2BlocksV2', '3min1Block', '3minBlock90sBlock', '3minParallelAIFormV1', '90s2Blocks', '90s2BlocksFixedForms' or null.
